trickyParts: Two layers of error suppression: TypeScript try-catch AND bash || true both needed fixing
Read functions intentionally keep try-catch for graceful degradation - only writes should fail loudly
implement.md has TWO handoff write sections (fresh + address-comments) - easy to miss one
legion-retro/SKILL.md also had || true on handoff writes - found during cross-family review
deviations: Also fixed legion-retro/SKILL.md which wasn't mentioned in the issue but had the same problem
